name: xpander.ai
pricing_notes: Free tier available; paid plans for production scale; pricing per agent execution

auth.notes: XPANDER_API_KEY; per-agent API key management available

performance.notes: Managed execution adds platform overhead vs self-hosted frameworks

agent_readiness.notes: Agent-as-a-service platform. Pre-built tool integrations (Slack, GitHub, Jira, etc.). Persistent memory. Multi-agent orchestration. SDK for Python/TS. Managed infrastructure with monitoring. Good for teams wanting managed agents without infra management.

gotchas: Newer company — production reliability track record limited
Vendor lock-in risk for core agent logic
Less documentation depth than established frameworks
Pricing at scale not fully transparent
best_when: Teams wanting managed agent infrastructure without ops burden
Rapid prototyping of agents with pre-built integrations
Non-ML engineers building agents who need guardrails
Business workflow automation with common SaaS tool integrations
avoid_when: Need full control over agent execution environment
Teams with existing self-hosted agent infrastructure
summary: xpander.ai is a managed agent-as-a-service platform with pre-built tool integrations and persistent memory. Designed to lower the barrier for building production agents without infrastructure management. Python/TypeScript SDK. Good fit for business workflow automation with common SaaS integrations (Slack, GitHub, Jira). Newer entrant with growing feature set.
